div.h3: Declaration of participation in the cooperative
div.p: Name, first name / or company represented by: Name, first name
Address
Postcode, city
Born on the
e-mail

p.strong:
Please tick and fill in: Note: Each member must have at least five business shares at
€, so no less than 180 € in total in the cooperative. A maximum of 50 cooperative shares are possible (see Section 13, Paragraph 1 of the Articles of Association)

div.p:
I hereby apply for admission to the. I would like to participate in the registered cooperative with a total of 5 shares. I undertake to make the payments of 36 € per share in the cooperative as stipulated by the statutes and by law. In total, I therefore undertake to pay 180 €. The articles of association of
are available on the Internet at
. This will also be handed over on request.

p.strong: I acknowledge that the articles of association stipulate a notice period of two years for the end of the financial year

div.p:
I would like to participate in the registered cooperative with
further shares. I undertake to make the payments of €
per share in the cooperative, as stipulated by the statutes and by law. In total, I therefore undertake to pay €

I apply to the board of directors of the cooperative for the option under the articles of association (Section 13 (2)) to allow payment in installments for the payment of the shares. Note: In this case, we will contact you to agree on the exact terms of the installment payment.

I hereby apply for admission to the
. For social reasons, I would like to participate in the registered cooperative with 1 share. I undertake to make the payments of €
per share in the cooperative, as stipulated by the statutes and by law. The articles of association of
can be found on the Internet at
. This will also be handed over on request. Note: In this case, we will contact you to clarify the conditions for the social tariff. I acknowledge that the articles of association stipulate a notice period of two years for the end of the financial year. After approval you will receive an email from us asking you to transfer your shares to the following account:
- IBAN: - BIC:

p.strong: Purpose: membership, surname and first name

div.p: Responsible for data processing is: FoodHub München Market eG, Munich. Data protection officer: Quentin Orain The name and address are required for the membership list of the cooperative (Art. 6 Para. 1c GDPR

In conjunction with Section 30 (1) Sentence 1 No. 1 GEnG). The tax identification number and the date of birth are required in order to be able to pay the withholding tax in the event of a profit distribution. (Art. 6 Paragraph 1c GDPR in conjunction with Section 45 d Paragraph 1 EStG) and to be able to carry out the legally required queries on the church tax attribute. (Art. 6 Paragraph 1c in conjunction with Section 51a Paragraph 2c, 2e EStG). You will be invited to meetings by the cooperative via the address, if applicable the e-mail address (Art. 6 Paragraph 1c GDPR) in conjunction with Section 46 Paragraph 1 Sentence 1 GenG in conjunction with Section 6 No. 4 GenG), beyond that Informed about offers of the cooperative within the framework of membership (Art. 6 Paragraph 1b GDPR) in conjunction with Section 1 Paragraph 1 in conjunction with the Articles of Association. The cooperative has a legitimate interest in uncomplicated and legally secure fulfillment of its obligations. The provision of personal data is required by law or by the articles of association. Failure to provide it would mean that membership cannot be established. The personal data will not be passed on to third parties unless consent has been given in individual cases. However, we are legally obliged to allow access to personal data in some cases. This affects, for example, other members, the statutory auditing association and authorities, especially the tax office. The data is stored in different ways. All tax-relevant information is kept for ten years (§147 AO). The data in the list of members (name and address in accordance with Section 30, Paragraph 2, Clause 1, No. 3 GenG) will not be deleted even after leaving. (Section 30, Paragraph 2, Clause 1, No. 3 GenG). You have the right to information from the person responsible about the relevant personal data as well as to correction or deletion or restriction of processing (unless this is contrary to a legal regulation). A data transfer can also be requested if the signatory wishes his data to be transferred to a third party.
In addition, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the supervisory authority (state commissioner for data protection).
Place, date:
Signature member:
Approval by the cooperative: The application is granted:
Place, date:
Signature of the board of directors:
I hereby declare that I am a member of the association
with effect from
Surname:
First name:
Address:
Postcode / City:
E-mail:
Phone number:

By providing my email address, I agree to receive communications from the association by email. The email address will never be passed on to third parties. I can revoke this declaration at any time. The dispatch of information relevant to the association (e.g. invitation to the general meeting) cannot be ruled out with the opt-out decision.
I have taken note of the statutes.
I pay 10 euros as an annual fee
The annual fee for the current year is due and payable immediately in full. I will transfer the contribution to the club account at GLS Bank - IBAN DE60 430 609 671 075 937 900 - BIC GENODEM1GLS.

In the following years it is due and payable on January 15th. I will pay this contribution annually to the above-mentioned association account. Membership is automatically extended by 1 year if it is not canceled 6 weeks before the end of the year.
Place, date:
Signature:
Foodhub e. V. Munich, c / o Impact HUB, Gotzinger Straße 8, 81371 Munich VR 208582 District Court Munich Bank details: GLS Community Bank eGIBAN DE60 430 609 671 075 937 900 - BIC GENODEM1GL
Foodhub e. V. Munich Kristin Mansmann c / o Impact HUB - Gotzinger Strasse 8, 81371 Munich
